news.title: Old rivals, new battle: Argentina and England clash in World Cup Semifinal
news.lede: BUENOS AIRES, Argentina — Football — or soccer as it's known in the U.S. — is more than a game, and the World Cup is more than a tournament. This truism rings clear in the semifinal match between the reigning World Cup champions Argentina and England, a storied rivalry that comes to life today in Atlanta. Despite Argentine coach Lionel Scaloni's message to fans that it is "a football game, period," the South American nation is vibrating with anticipation of the faceoff that is steeped in geopolitics and historical reckoning. "I'm very anxious and nervous, but more than anything, I have a lot of faith," said Pablo Medina, 29, Tuesday night in Buenos Aires, on his way into the screening of a new documentary about the other famous World Cup match-up between the two nations, in 1986.

news.title: World Cup future hosts: Centenary celebration, Saudi spectacular & a possible return to the US
news.lede: FIFA’s decision to expand the World Cup for the 2026 edition in the United States, Canada and Mexico did not meet with universal approval. However, given that the tournament has rivalled Italy 1990 in the excitement stakes, the move undoubtedly delivered the desired results. The governing body will now be under immense pressure to ensure that upcoming World Cups produce a similar outcome. The 2030 World Cup will primarily be hosted by Morocco, Portugal and Spain.

news.title: 2026 World Cup: All the European sides' group stage and knockout stage fixtures and results
news.lede: Keep track of all the European sides' fixtures and results at the World Cup in Canada, Mexico and the United States. The 2026 FIFA World Cup in Canada, Mexico and the United States kicked off on 11 June and concludes with the final in East Rutherford on 19 July. Check out all the details of the European teams' matches. Wednesday 17 June: W 4-2 vs Croatia (Dallas) Tuesday 23 June: D 0-0 vs Ghana (Boston) Saturday 27 June: W 2-0 vs Panama (New York) Wednesday 1 July (R32): W 2-1 vs DR Congo (Atlanta) Monday 6 July (R16): W 3-2 vs Mexico (Mexico City) Saturday 11 July (QF): W 2-1 aet vs Norway (Miami) Wednesday 15 July (SF): vs Argentina (Atlanta, 21:00).

news.title: England vs Argentina Predictions & Best Bets: World Cup 2026 Semifinal Odds, Lineups, Picks
news.lede: The England vs Argentina match is very important to both teams. This is international soccer's most historically hostile rivalry and it takes center stage in North America. Thomas Tuchel’s squad faces Lionel Scaloni’s reigning world champions at Atlanta’s Mercedes-Benz Stadium. With Spain having already punched its ticket to the final by shutting down France 2-0, either the Three Lions or the Albiceleste will claim the final spot on the ultimate stage for a chance to win it all.

news.title: World Cup final 2026 date and time: Spain to face England or Argentina
news.lede: This content is provided by Exco Player and may use cookies or similar technologies. Please click 'Allow and Continue' below to load the content. Spain will face England or Argentina in the World Cup 2026 final. La Roja became the first team to book their place in this weekend’s tournament showpiece with a 2-0 win over France in Arlington, Texas.

news.title: Haiti parts ways with World Cup coach Sébastien Migné weeks after historic appearance
news.lede: Sébastien Migné is no longer Haiti's head coach, the Haitian Football Federation confirmed Tuesday. The Frenchman and the national soccer governing body have mutually agreed to part ways following Haiti's historic qualification for the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The decision follows weeks of public debate over Migné's future after Les Grenadiers exited the global competition without earning a point, despite competitive performances. PORT-AU-PRINCE — Sébastien Migné, the French coach who led Haiti back to the FIFA World Cup for the first time since 1974, is no longer at the helm of Les Grenadiers after the Haitian Football Federation announced Tuesday that both sides had mutually agreed to end his contract.

news.title: British Open 2026: England's World Cup run is setting up a 'great problem to have' come Sunday at Birkdale
news.lede: SOUTHPORT, England — Mark Darbon, R&A CEO, says he'll be rooting for England’s football team Wednesday night as the country takes on Argentina in the World Cup semifinals. Should it win and make it to the finals for the first time since 1966, however, it will create what Darbon describes as a “great problem to have” come Sunday night with the collision between the sports' biggest events. The Open Championship’s final round is scheduled to end at 6:40 p.m. local time, which would then leave fans in the area anxious to get to TVs to see the World Cup’s 8 p.m. kickoff, the match starting at 3 p.m. in the United States. Asked about the matter during his Wednesday press conference, Darbon acknowledged that the R&A has given a lot of thought about potentially moving up Sunday’s tee times to provide more room between the two events, but that for now, things remain as scheduled.

news.title: World Cup Blues, of a Sort
news.lede: COMMENTARY: Five points on what’s wrong with soccer in general and the FIFA World Cup in particular. KRAKOW — I usually find the quadrennial FIFA World Cup aggravating for the five reasons enumerated below, plus one other: my students here in the Tertio Millennio Seminar on the Free Society are sometimes so obsessed with the competition that it becomes challenging to keep our community of learners focused on the seminar’s deep dive into Catholic social doctrine. But as we have few students this year whose countries even made it to the tourney’s knockout stage, interest is somewhat more muted than in the past.
